form.formComment: He is resuming after a 18 months break. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Moonee Valley 3yo Mdn-Sw October 4 2024 over 1200m, 6 len behind Brandjam with 58kg at $19. On debut fourth of 12 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw September 20 2024 over 1000m, soft track; 2 len behind Flash 'N' Dash with 58kg at $19. A bold return is likely.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 11 months 4th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Benriach with 59.5kg at $31. Previously second-up eased back early on 8th of 10 at Kerang Mdn-Sw on April 19 over 1400m, 5 len behind Eyes Wide Shut with 59.5kg at $3.60. Likely to hold the good form and play a major role again.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, got back early 8th of 10 at Echuca 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 1200m, 5 len behind Baganov with 58kg at $7. Second-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1100m, 1.3 len behind Life After Love with 59kg at $7. Coming along nicely and is expected to make the finish.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old filly by Nicconi out of Waitomo Toka AUD $ 35,000 (Inglis 2024 Premier Yearling Sale) purchase. At the most recent trial finished seventh on March 26 at Caulfield Heath over 1000m. Likely to be better for this experience.
